items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original Reproduction Exclusive Real Photos 📷【Chess Messenger Bag】N40561 Red (Check)
Inspired by the iconic Damier check of the House, Creative Director Pharrell Williams created this unique shape for the new Damier Pop coated canvas. The bag combines other House design clues, including natural leather trim, reinforced corners, and a top handle. The detachable strap can be adjusted for crossbody carrying.
Size: 24 x 24 x 8 cm

items.name_en: Authentic Grade
items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE New Bucket Bag
Louise is crafted from calfskin suede with a sleek, fluid bucket silhouette. The deep background highlights the exquisite, sparkling gold Triomphe triumph logo, presenting a relaxed and casual temperament. The bag features a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, offering ample capacity for daily commuting, business trips, and office work without any pressure🤎
Style: 116613
Color: Grey (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 28x24x16

items.name_en: Authentic Grade
items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CABAS ANAIS Grain Calfskin Handbag👜 Small. CE's latest tote bag. A different kind of tote.
It looks exceptionally high-end and refined, with a lazy vintage vibe. Simple and understated. It is incredibly practical. Grain calfskin is completely worry-free regarding scratches 🫶🏻 Perfect for forgetful besties~ The side ears can be adjusted freely, and it easily fits a laptop 📒 or daily essentials when open.
Features one main compartment
One interior flat pocket
Two long leather handles
Includes a long shoulder strap
Style: 118613
Color: Light Apricot
Dimensions: 20.5(Opening 35)x9x19cm
💰:
